title: mini changelog --version <v>
goal: Add a '--version <v>' flag to 'mini changelog' (and the /mini:changelog slash command) that prints the section for a specific version; an unknown version is reported with the list of available versions. Reuses the phase-101 section parser.

steps.title: Version lookup helper + flag
steps.detail: In changelog.ts add findVersion(sections, v) (match on the bracket version, tolerant of a leading 'v'); add a 'version?' field to ChangelogOptions and wire '--version <v>' in cli.ts. The command prints the matched section, or warns with the list of available versions when not found. Unit tests for the helper.

steps.title: Command behaviour + tests
steps.detail: Extend commands/changelog.ts to handle --version; add command tests (temp dir) for a hit, an unknown version (lists available), and the 'v' prefix tolerance.

steps.title: Docs and slash command
steps.detail: Update the /mini:changelog argument-hint and body with --version <v>, the README commands table/slash list, and add an English CHANGELOG entry.
